localeSettings.heading: Language preferences
localeSettings.description: Interface language controls menus and navigation. Report language controls parent reports and Copilot answers.
localeSettings.interfaceHint: Applies to menus, buttons, and site navigation.
localeSettings.reportHint: Applies to progress reports and Parent Copilot. Changing interface language does not change this after you set report language explicitly.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.intro: Have a question, idea, comment, or bug to report? We would love to hear from you. Reach out about learning, your child's account, parent reports, games, cards, or your experience using the site.

form.hint: Do not enter passwords, login codes, or other sensitive information here.
form.success: Your message was sent. Thank you for reaching out!
form.deliveryPending: The form was validated, but email delivery from the site is still being configured on the server. For now, contact us directly using the email button below.

errors.rateLimit: Too many messages in a short time. Please try again later.

social.instagramAria: Open Instagram page in a new window
social.youtubeAria: Open Leo Kids YouTube in a new window
social.facebookAria: Open Leo Kids Facebook in a new window

whoFor.a: The site is for children who want to practice and progress, and for parents and teachers who want a clearer picture of progress, strengths, and topics worth reinforcing.

subjects.a: The site includes practice in math, geometry, English, and science — based on what is open and available for your child.

parentsSee.a: Parents can view reports showing performance, repeating mistakes, strengths, and topics to keep practicing.

reinforcement.q: Is the site good for children who need reinforcement?
reinforcement.a: Yes. The goal is gradual, clear practice so every child can move at their own pace and reinforce topics where they struggle.

games.q: Are there games on the site?
games.a: Yes. Alongside academic practice there are educational games, Leo games, play-with-friends options, and coins and cards in the kids world.

reportBug.q: How can I report a bug or send an idea?
reportBug.a: Contact us using the email button on this page. We welcome feedback, ideas, and reports that help improve the site.

homepage.brandLine: LEO KIDS — tools for parents, a fun experience for kids, and learning that moves step by step

hero.titleLine2: Learning that moves step by step.
hero.subtitle: LEO KIDS connects practice and games for kids with a system that maps progress and gives parents a clear picture.
hero.videoTitle: See it from a parent's view
hero.videoDescription: Meet the tracking, reports, and personal activities.
hero.infoLine: LEO KIDS — tools for parents, a fun experience for kids, and learning that moves step by step

0.title: Tools for parents
0.text: See what your child practiced, where they are improving, and what to reinforce.

1.title: Experience for kids
1.text: Practice, games, coins, and progress in a friendly, colorful journey.

2.title: Progress mapping
2.text: Tracking by subject, topic, skill, and sub-skill.

parentIntro.label: For parents
parentIntro.title: See your child clearly — not just a score
parentIntro.text: Get a clear picture of strengths and gaps, then send a focused activity that matches what they need right now.

parentVideo.title: See it from a parent's view
parentVideo.description: Watch a short video about tracking, reports, and parent activities.

learningSystem.label: The system behind learning
learningSystem.title: We map how your child progresses — not just right or wrong
learningSystem.textPart0: Every practice session feeds into one picture:
learningSystem.textPart1: by subject, topic, sub-topic, skill, and sub-skill.
learningSystem.textPart2: That helps spot wins, repeating mistakes, and what to reinforce — with a clear report and focused next steps.

subject-map.title: Map by subject and topic
subject-map.text: See progress across math, geometry, English, and science down to the topics practiced.

skills.title: Skills and sub-skills
skills.text: The system looks at which skills were needed — not only whether an answer was correct.

spot-difficulty.title: Spot focused difficulty
spot-difficulty.text: Repeating mistakes can point to a specific skill worth reinforcing.

over-time.title: Track over time
over-time.text: The picture builds from real practice — not a single score.

parent-report.title: Clear parent report
parent-report.text: Plain language: what your child knows, where they are moving, and what to focus on.

focused-work.title: Focused follow-up
focused-work.text: Parents can send a personal activity targeting a topic or skill.

0.title: Understand what's happening
0.text: A broader view than one grade — built from real activity.

1.title: Know where to focus
1.text: Reports help pick the next topic to reinforce.

2.title: Send personal activities
2.text: Assign focused practice and follow results afterward.

3.title: See progress over time
3.text: Practice, games, and activities connect into an updating picture.

parentBenefits.highlight: Instead of guessing where it's hard — get organized insight about what to work on.

kids.label: For kids
kids.title: Learn the way kids like to
kids.text: Answer questions, move at your own pace, play, collect rewards, and come back for more.
kids.videoDescription: Watch a short video about practice, games, surprises, and progress in the kids world.

0.title: Practice that feels like play
0.text: Colorful questions and challenges that make practice feel lighter.

1.title: Your own pace
1.text: Leo guides you so you can keep trying without pressure.

2.title: Games and learning together
2.text: Mix subject practice with fun breaks in one place.

3.title: Coins, cards, and surprises
3.text: Progress comes with rewards that encourage coming back.

howItWorks.title: Get started in a few simple steps
howItWorks.step1: Add your child and get personal login details
howItWorks.step2: Child starts learning, practicing, and playing
howItWorks.step3: The system maps progress; parents get reports and can send focused activities

finalCta.title: Want a clearer picture of how your child is doing?
finalCta.text: Open an account, add your child, and build an organized learning picture from practice, activities, and games.

teachers.label: For private tutors
teachers.title: Organized practice and tracking between lessons
teachers.text: Send focused activities, see how students perform, and continue from the lesson at home.

about.imageAlt: Leo — smart learning environment for kids
about.title: About Leo — learn, practice, and progress
about.intro0: Welcome to Leo — a smart learning environment built to help children practice, understand, and progress at a pace that fits them.
about.intro1: The site is designed for elementary learners with practice by subject, grade, topic, and difficulty level. Every child can start where it makes sense, move forward gradually, and reinforce the topics where they need more confidence.
about.intro2: Our goal is to make learning clearer, friendlier, and more accurate: less guessing, less frustration, and a better understanding of what your child already knows and what still needs reinforcement.
about.missionBody: We help children build confidence in learning, strengthen foundational and advanced skills, and give parents a clearer picture of their child's progress.
about.missionMuted: The system combines practice, playfulness, parent reports, and progress summaries to create a learning process that feels personal, organized, and encouraging.
about.learnEnjoyBody: Beyond academic practice, the site includes educational games, engaging play, coins, and cards designed to add fun, motivation, and enjoyment to learning. The goal is for kids not to feel they are only "doing homework," but entering a colorful kids world where they can learn, play, and progress with a good feeling.
about.learnEnjoyMuted: There are solo games, educational games, and opportunities to play with friends — depending on what is open and available on the site.
about.featuresTitle: What will you find on the site?

0.title: Engaging games
0.text: Games that add interest and fun, encouraging kids to keep practicing.

1.title: Social experiences
1.text: Play with friends and social experiences where available — in a positive, friendly way.

2.title: Motivation to learn
2.text: A mix of practice, coins, cards, games, and challenges that encourage kids to continue.

0.title: Learning at your own pace
0.text: Every child moves according to their ability, with practice matched to their level and the topics they need to reinforce.

1.title: A clear picture for parents
1.text: Reports help you understand where your child succeeds, where they struggle, and what to practice next.

2.title: A friendly experience for kids
2.text: The site combines practice, games, coins, cards, and a welcoming design to encourage persistence and positive learning.

1.text: Practice matched by age band, topic, and level for gradual, clear progress.

2.text: A clear summary of performance, mistakes, strengths, and areas to improve.

3.text: Solo games, educational games, play with friends, coins, and cards.

gallery.title: Leo's gallery
gallery.subtitle: Photos and videos of Leo — the dog who accompanies kids throughout the site.
gallery.intro: Get to know Leo up close through moments, photos, and videos that add warmth and life to the kids' world on the site.
gallery.empty: No photos or videos to show.

pwa.installBody: Tap "Install" below to add the app to your home screen.
pwa.iosIntro: On Apple devices, install the app through Safari:
pwa.iosStep2: Tap the Share button in the browser toolbar.
pwa.iosStep3: Scroll the menu and choose "Add to Home Screen".
pwa.iosStep4: Make sure "Open as Web App" is enabled, if shown.
pwa.iosStep5: Tap "Add". The app icon will appear on your home screen.
pwa.iosHelpFooter: Don't see "Add to Home Screen"? Scroll to the bottom of the menu, tap "Edit Actions", and add it to the list.
pwa.alreadyInstalled: The app is already installed on this device.
pwa.nativeOnlyBrowser: PWA install is available in the browser, not in the installed native app.
pwa.installedStudent: LEO KIDS is installed. Open the LEO KIDS icon from your home screen.
pwa.installedParent: P LEO KIDS is installed. Open the P LEO KIDS icon from your home screen.
pwa.installedTeacher: T LEO KIDS is installed. Open the T LEO KIDS icon from your home screen.
pwa.promptAcceptedStudent: Chrome accepted the install. If the LEO KIDS icon does not appear on your home screen within a minute, refresh the page and try again. If there is still no icon, remove previous installs of this site from app settings.
pwa.promptAcceptedParent: Chrome accepted the install. If the P LEO KIDS icon does not appear on your home screen within a minute, refresh the page and try again. If there is still no icon, remove previous installs of this site from app settings.
pwa.promptAcceptedTeacher: Chrome accepted the install. If the T LEO KIDS icon does not appear on your home screen within a minute, refresh the page and try again.
pwa.unavailableConsumed: The install prompt was already used. Refresh the page to try again, if Chrome still allows it.
pwa.unavailableError: The install prompt failed. Refresh the page and try again.
pwa.unavailableNoPromptStudent: Chrome did not offer an install prompt for LEO KIDS right now. Make sure the app is not already installed, then try refreshing.
pwa.unavailableNoPromptParent: Chrome did not offer an install prompt for P LEO KIDS right now. Make sure LEO KIDS is installed and try refreshing — the two apps should be separate.
pwa.unavailableNoPromptTeacher: Chrome did not offer an install prompt for T LEO KIDS right now. Make sure the app is not already installed, then try refreshing.

panel.title: Ask about the report
panel.disclaimer: This information is based on practice data on the site and is not a diagnosis or professional advice.
panel.intro: You can ask freely about the report here, for example: what matters most right now, what to focus on this week, what's going well, or how to explain it to your child.
panel.errorGeneric: Unable to answer the question right now. Please try again in a moment.
